summary: Highly praised killer show, though recording specifics are unclear
review: The reviewer rates the performance a perfect five stars and calls it a "killer" show worth hearing at random. No details about song selection, band members or audio fidelity are provided, leaving the technical quality unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single five‑star review is available; it praises the show but offers no insight into recording or musical specifics.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not mention soundboard vs. audience, clarity, or any mix issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments; reviewer simply described the show as "killer".
